case_title: DEO SINGH VS. EOWYN et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: MENDEZ, DAVID GERARD SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR SINGH, DEO
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SINGH, DEO AS TO DEFENDANT EOWYN DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SINGH, DEO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EOWYN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 447 VALENCIA ST. #309, S.F. CA. 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
